retry_reason: Failure means the queue ID does not exist; retrying without any creation logic will not succeed as the condition is not transient.
contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper that looks up a usermode queue by qid in the xarray protected by a spinlock. If found, it increments the kref reference count, ensuring the queue remains alive for the caller. The caller receives a pointer to the queue with an additional reference; the caller must release this reference via the corresponding put function (likely amdgpu_userq_put) when done. If the queue is not found (NULL returned), no reference is taken. The function does not allocate or create the queue; it only retrieves an existing one.
